_meta.purpose: Synthetic ToS corpus used to calibrate the rubric. 30 hand-written profiles spread across the A..F bands. Each entry carries the flag and credit lists that the on-device model is expected to extract on a similar real document, plus the expected grade after computeScore() is applied. No real company names appear here.

schema.profile: friendly | reasonable | moderate | concerning | aggressive | extreme
schema.text: short, hand-authored excerpt with the marquee clauses for that profile
schema.flags: [{ category, severity }] - what the model should extract
schema.credits: [{ category }] - what the model should extract
